notes: TEXTUAL, not visual. High endurecimento (2.3) reflects extreme abstraction of body into words. #sem-iiif
Confirmed 1.4. Treasury Sec. Gage worried about 'artistic nudity on currency.' dessexualizacao=0 likely correct.
Confirmed 1.0. PAIRED with US-001 for Painel VI (same motif, different perspectives).

Confirmed 0.8. One of earliest American constitutional allegories.
MOST IMPORTANT US ITEM. Regime reclassified normativo→FUNDACIONAL (counter-foundational). desincorporacao 1→0: this IS a real body. Key for thesis conclusion.
Key counter-example anchoring LOW end of endurecimento. Atlas: Painel I.

Confirmed 1.7. 500,000-copy run. Nearly identical endurecimento to FR-007 (1.8) — WWI poster genre produces consistent purification cross-nationally.

ANALYTICALLY CENTRAL to thesis. Morphological terminus of desincorporação. Score revised 2.4→2.8: four indicators raised to 3 (desincorporação, dessexualização, uniformização, serialidade). #verificado-imagem. Atlas: Painel VI (maximum normativo).

Out of temporal scope (1559) but essential genealogical reference. Very low endurecimento — rich narrative, embodied figure, no bureaucratic hardening. Pre-foundational: the tradition from which 19th-c. allegory descends.
Image not accessed. serialidade 0->1 (multi-figure decorative program). Score 1.8->1.9. #verificar-imagem
Confirmed 0.6. Paired with US-006 for Painel VI. Maximum narrative = minimum endurecimento.
Image not accessed. desincorporacao 2->3 (only head survives), heraldizacao 3->2 (no visible heraldic devices in fragment). Net score unchanged at 2.4. #verificar-imagem

Interesting liminal object — between foundational propaganda and normative bureaucratic instrument. Low endurecimento consistent with revolutionary dynamism. Small-scale figures limit detailed indicator coding.
Confirmed 1.0. UK baseline. Note: 'UK' by collection (Wellcome), not origin (French artist).
Image not accessed. All 10 indicators confirmed unchanged. Score 1.7 confirmed. #verificar-imagem
Confirmed 1.5. Photography resists endurecimento by preserving individual body.

Confirmed 1.0. Low endurecimento for militar = popular chromolithographic style resists formal rigidity. Compare US-003 (normativo, 2.2) vs US-007 (militar, 1.0) — normative Bureau plate MORE ENDURECIDO than martial popular print.
Confirmed 2.3. Identical to UK-002 by design, not artifact.
Image not accessed. serialidade 1->2 (explicit pairing of interchangeable female types). Score 1.0->1.1. #verificar-imagem
Confirmed 2.2. 'Zero degree' of normative endurecimento in US corpus.
TEXTUAL. 2.5 reflects extreme formality. Earliest known monumental Justiça in Brazil (1872). #sem-iiif
Confirmed 1.4. Monocromatizacao=3 is medium artifact (photo).
#verificado-imagem. Steinlen scores LOWER than Lelong (1.2 vs 1.7) despite same wartime context — artist style modulates endurecimento. Atlas: Painel V.
Confirmed 1.4. Polychromatic (mono=0) and unique (serial=0) keep endurecimento moderate.

Key foundational painting for BR corpus. Endurecimento moderate — heraldization and architectural framing are strong (throne, mosaic), but body retains some dynamism through the green mantle draping. Sword is decorative, not raised.
Confirmed 1.7. Borderline case: heraldizacao=2 debatable — bodies themselves become heraldic signs. Needs methodological note in thesis.
LOW-endurecimento anchor for Brazil. Contrast pair with BR-009 (0.5 vs 2.2) = most powerful endurecimento demonstration in single national tradition. Atlas: Painel VII.
Score corrected 1.2→1.1 (monocromatizacao 1→0: full color lithograph). Belle Epoque style resists endurecimento even in militar context.
KEY ITEM. Contrast with BR-010 (Visconti, 0.5) = 50-year endurecimento arc. Every indicator rises. Atlas: Painel VII.
EXCEPTIONAL for thesis. Demonstrates DELEGATION mechanism in Contrato Sexual Visual. Atlas: Painel II.
Confirmed 1.6. Controversial at issuance ('nude women on money'). Morphological vs material indicator split: low body purification + high state inscription.
Confirmed 0.7. Rich narrative (apagamento=0) keeps endurecimento low.
Confirmed 2.1. Delta from BR-002 proves medium mediation thesis.
Confirmed 0.7. Lowest BR item. Consider 'ornamental' tag.
Most theoretically dense BR item. Positivism + racial exclusion + Contrato Sexual Visual. Key for Cap. 7.4.

Highest fundacional item (2.3). enquadramento_arquitetonico=3 is the driver. Morphologically normativo.

Adjusted 3.0→2.9 (inscricao_estatal 3→2: authority is architectural, not textual). Highest or near-highest in corpus. Perfect 3.0 reserved as theoretical ceiling.
Confirmed 0.5. Pre-endurecimento baseline — soft founding visual vocabulary.

Very low endurecimento — narrative is rich (apagamento_narrativo=0), bodies are dynamic and differentiated. Quintessentially foundational: Liberty still has wings, still acts. Compare with FR-040 (companion piece) for same series.
Confirmed 1.8.

Strong sculptural presence. Desincorporação=2 because of heavy classicizing that removes corporeal individuality. Fasces + inscription = heraldization. Transitional toward normativo but still foundational energy in the raised arm.
ESSENTIAL counter-example. 1871 Commune/Thiers = zero-point for Third Republic purification. Tag: #contra-alegoria. Atlas: Painel VII.
Confirmed 0.8. Slightly higher than EU-002 (0.5) due to proto-serial print production.

Slightly higher endurecimento than FR-039 — Liberty is more static (seated), heraldization begins (lion as attribute). But narrative richness (apagamento=0) and dynamic combat scene keep it foundational. Paired with FR-039 in Boizot's series.
